sentence: Never stage your sonchalashout on someone else's restaurarpet.

wombos.definition: The carpet inside a restaurant — specifically invoked in the context of a messy or chaotic scene unfolding on it.
wombos.example: Don't spill that on the restaurarpet — they just cleaned it.

wombos.definition: A nonchalashout directed at or delivered in the context of a son — a dramatic, emotionally-charged outburst filtered through a son-coded dynamic.
wombos.example: He had a full sonchalashout in the middle of practice and stormed off the court.
